title: Vulpine
description: A small mod which adds fox taming and new fox variants
body: # Vulpine Vulpine is a small mod which adds tamable foxes (via domestication) and also adds new fox variations to the Overworld. ## Fox Taming Foxes can be tamed by breading them to eventually get a tamed variation. Basically every fox now has a number assigned to them representing their Tame Progress. When two foxes are bred, the fox with the lower Tame Progress value is then given to the offspring and incremented (e.x. two foxes with a Tame Progress value of 0 will have an offspring with a value of 1). These values range from 0 to 4, with 0 being completely wild, and 4 being completely tamed. ## Fox Variants New fox variants have been added, each spawning with different percentages and biomes, here's a table showing the different variants, where they spawn, and their probability of spawning: | Picture | Name | Found At | Spawn Chance | |--------|-------|-----------|-----------------| | | Red Fox | Any non-snowy Taiga Biome | Normal Taiga: 5/9, Old Growth Taiga: 2/9 | | | Arctic Fox | Any Snowy Taiga Biome | Snowy Taiga: 4/5 | | | Silver Fox | Any Taiga Biome | Normal Taiga: 2/9, Old Growth Taiga: 1/9, Snowy Taiga: 1/5 | | | Cross Fox | Any non-snowy Taiga Biome | Normal Taiga: 2/9, Old Growth Taiga: 1/9 | | | Gray Fox | Only in Old Growth Taiga Biome | Old Growth Taiga: 5/9 | | | Talon Fox | Does not spawn naturally. Is obtained by naming a fox "Talon" | See **Found At** |
